cases.title: Michelson v. Northwest Georgia Presbytery
topics: BCO 43-1 act or decision of a court
cases.synopsis: The SJC dismissed the complaint as judicially out of order because it targeted actions of a congregational meeting rather than any act or decision of a court of the Church, as required by BCO 43-1. A dissenting opinion by RE Jack Wilson and seven others argued that the Complainants had sufficiently identified an act of the Session (calling the congregational meeting with the stated purposes) to present a justiciable issue.
